prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **EJ-DE** 1.3L turbocharged inline-4 with a **Toda Racing forged crankshaft** (87mm stroke) and **JE Pistons 8.5:1 forged slugs** (81mm bore) to handle 1.5-bar boost reliably. Pair with **Tomei 264° duration camshafts** (intake/exhaust) and **Supertech valve springs** for high-RPM stability up to 8,500 RPM.

Forced Induction: Swap the stock **IHI RHF4** turbo for a **Garrett GT2560R** (56 trim, .60 A/R turbine housing) with a **custom 3-inch stainless downpipe** (fabricated by **HKS**) and **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller. Intercooler upgrade to **GReddy Type-S front-mount** (550x225x76mm core) with **Samco silicone hoses** and **Koyorad slim fans** for consistent 280-300whp on **E85 blend**.

Drivetrain: Install a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2.5-way) in the **C58 transaxle** with **PPG straight-cut gears** (1st: 3.083, 2nd: 2.045, 3rd: 1.458) and **Nismo 4.111 final drive**. Clutch upgrade to **Exedy Hyper Twin** (ceramic/metallic) with **Daihatsu Sport lightweight flywheel** (4.5kg). Half-shafts reinforced with **Driveshaft Shop Stage 2 CV axles** (chromoly, 30-spline).
estetica: Aero: **Tommy Kaira M20 aero kit** (front bumper, side skirts, rear diffuser) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (3.5kg weight reduction, functional vents). Rear wing: **Voltex Type-3** (1,200mm span, 3D carbon) mounted on **Cusco aluminum wing risers**. Underbody: **J's Racing flat floor panel** (polycarbonate) and **C-West rear diffuser** (3-piece, adjustable angle).

Suspension: **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear, 30-way damping) with **Cusco front strut bar** (22mm hollow) and **Ultra Racing rear lower tie bar** (YRV-specific). Bushings: **Whiteline poly bushings** (front control arms, rear trailing arms) and **SuperPro anti-lift kit** (front). Wheels: **Rays Gram Lights 57CR** (15x8 +35, 4x100 PCD) with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** (195/50/15).

Interior: **Bride Zeta III** (fixed-back, carbon shell) with **Takata Drift II harnesses** (4-point, FIA-approved). Dash: **Defi BF Advance** (oil temp, boost, EGT, wideband) mounted on **Sparco carbon fiber dash panel**. Steering: **Nardi Classic 350mm** (deep-dish, suede) with **NRG quick-release hub**. Sound deadening: **Dynamat Xtreme** (full floor, doors, firewall) with **JL Audio 10W3v3** (sealed enclosure, 0.75 cu. ft.) in rear hatch.
